name: 2-Way Formation — Jump 2 (2026-02-06 19:40 UTC)
description: Second jump of the day. 2-way formation with riley and divyatej_dt (russ sat this one out). Exit ~14,200 ft AGL. Surface alt 614 ft. This is the same riley log originally uploaded as the standalone 'billy' flight.txt. Firmware V110. Log hash IDs: 9CECECF2 (riley), 93D28166 (divyatej_dt).
